summary: A detected delta gap must surface as an explicit stale transition before the replacement snapshot lands.

order_contract.expectation: consumer records the causality break before any replacement state is trusted
stale labeling is emitted immediately after the gap is detected
fresh snapshot_epoch=2 replaces the stale lineage only after resync_required was observed

drift_detected_if: snapshot_epoch=2 arrives without a preceding delta_gap_detected note and resync_required frame
consumer continues to accept epoch-1 deltas after the resync_required frame
recovery_behavior: Discard epoch-1 deltas, preserve the stale snapshot only for review, and wait for the replacement snapshot before resuming exact actions.
